person.userCertifiedLifeSummary:
«b»Biography«/b»
Father Sir Henry FitzHenry, Lord FitzHugh d. 24 Sep 1352

Mother Joan de Fourneux d. 21 Sep 1349

Joan FitzHenry was born at of Ravensworth, Richmondshire, England.

She married Sir William de Greystoke, 2nd Lord Greystoke, son of Sir Ralph de Greystoke, 3rd Baron Greystoke and Alice de Audley, circa 9 October 1351.

They had 3 sons (Ralph; William; & Robert) and 1 daughter (Alice, wife of Sir Robert Harington, 3rd Lord Harington).

Joan FitzHenry married Sir Anthony de Lucy, 3rd Lord Lucy, son of Sir Thomas de Lucy, 2nd Lord Lucy and Margaret de Multon, before 29 April 1366; Pardoned this date for marrying without a license. They had 1 daughter (Joan).

Joan FitzHenry married Sir Matthew IV Redman, Governor of Berwick & Roxburgh, son of Sir Matthew III de Redman, Sheriff of Cumberland and Margaret, between 16 September 1368 and 6 May 1378.

Joan FitzHenry died on 1 September 1403 at Clerkenwell, Middlesex, England; Buried there.

«b»Family 1«/b»
Sir Matthew IV Redman, Governor of Berwick & Roxburgh b. c 1329, d. a 8 Jan 1398

«b»Child«/b»
1.) Sir Richard Redmayne d. 22 May 1426

«b»Family 2«/b»
Sir William de Greystoke, 2nd Lord Greystoke b. 6 Jan 1321, d. 10 Jul 1359

«b»Children«/b»
1.) Alice Greystoke d. c 1377

2.) Sir Ralph Greystoke, 3rd Lord Greystoke & FitzWilliam, Constable of Lochmaben Castle, Justice, Steward, & Keeper of the lordship of Annandale b. 18 Oct 1353, d. 6 Apr 1418.

«b»Family 3«/b»
Sir Anthony de Lucy, 3rd Lord Lucy b. c 1335, d. 19 Aug 1368 or 16 Sep 1368

«b»Child«/b»
1.) Joan de Lucy, 4th Baroness Lucy b. Oct 1366, d. 30 Sep 1369

zh.lifeSummary: Joan Fitzhugh是Henry FitzHugh和Joan Fourneux的女兒，於1338年出生在英國越可爾拉文斯沃斯。她於大約1351年與William Greystoke結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1403年9月1日在英國米德萊可可拉肯維爾 聖 詹姆斯享年65歲，埋葬在英國米德萊可可拉肯維爾 聖 詹姆斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Joan Fitzhugh是Henry FitzHugh和Joan Fourneux的女儿，于1338年出生在英国越可爾拉文斯沃斯。她于大约1351年与William Greystoke结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1403年9月1日在英国米德萊可可拉肯維爾 聖 詹姆斯享年65岁，埋葬在英国米德萊可可拉肯維爾 聖 詹姆斯。

nameMeanings.name: Fitzhugh
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Northamptonshire): from Anglo-Norman French fi(t)z ‘son’ (see Fitz ) + the personal name Hugh (see Hugh ), ‘son of Hugh’.

History: William Fitzhugh (1651–1701), from Bedford, England, emigrated to VA c. 1670 and established himself on the Potomac River in what was then Stafford County, VA, as a planter and exporter. He also practiced law, was a member of the Virginia House of Burgesses, and served in 1687 as lieutenant colonel of the county militia.

variants.name: Fitz
meanings: English: from Anglo-Norman French fi(t)z ‘son’ (from Latin filius), used originally to distinguish a son from a father bearing the same personal name and then conventionalized as a hereditary surname, or short for a surname of which fiz ‘son’ was the first element, for example Fitzhenry and Fitzroy .
German: from a vernacular pet form of the personal name Vinzenz (see Vincent ) or Vitus (see Vito , compare Veit ). Compare also Fietz .

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

variants.name: John
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: Joan Fitzhugh was born in 1338, in Ravensworth, Yorkshire, England as the daughter of Henry FitzHugh and Joan Fourneux. She married William Greystoke about 1351. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. She died on 1 September 1403, in Clerkenwell St James, Middlesex, England, at the age of 65, and was buried in Clerkenwell St James, Middlesex, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Joan Fitzhugh est née en 1338, à Ravensworth, Everwyck, Angleterre, fille de Henry FitzHugh et Joan Fourneux. Elle a épousé William Greystoke environ 1351. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 1 septembre 1403, à Clerkenwell St James, Middlesex, Angleterre, à l’âge de 65 ans, et a été enterrée à Clerkenwell St James, Middlesex, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Joan Fitzhugh wurde 1338 in Ravensworth, Yorkshire, England, als Tochter von Henry FitzHugh und Joan Fourneux geboren. Sie hat um 1351 William Greystoke geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 1. September 1403 im Alter von 65 Jahren in Clerkenwell St James, Middlesex, England und wurde in Clerkenwell St James, Middlesex, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Joan Fitzhugh è nata il nel 1338 nel Ravensworth, Yorkshire, England come figlia di Henry FitzHugh e Joan Fourneux. Lei sposato William Greystoke circa 1351. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 1 settembre 1403, nel Clerkenwell St James, Middlesex, England, all'età di 65 anni, e fu sepolta a Clerkenwell St James, Middlesex, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Joan Fitzhughは1338年にイギリスヨークシュアイアラベンスウオルスでHenry FitzHughとJoan Fourneuxの娘として生まれた。約1351年にWilliam Greystokeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1403年9月1日にイギリスミッドレセックスクラーケンウエル スト ジャムスで65歳で死去し，イギリスミッドレセックスクラーケンウエル スト ジャムスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Joan Fitzhugh(은)는 1338년 영국 요르크실르 레이븐스워스에서 Henry FitzHugh(와)과 Joan Fourneux의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 대략 1351년 William Greystoke(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1403년 9월 1일 영국 미들레세스 클레르켄웰 스트 자메스에서 65세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 미들레세스 클레르켄웰 스트 자메스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Joan Fitzhugh nasceu em 1338, em Ravensworth, Yorkshire, Inglaterra filha de Henry FitzHugh e Joan Fourneux. Ela casou-se com William Greystoke aproximadamente 1351. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1 de setembro de 1403, em Clerkenwell St James, Middlesex, Inglaterra, com 65 anos, e foi sepultada em Clerkenwell St James, Middlesex, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Joan Fitzhugh родилась в 1338 г. в местности равенсворт, еркшир, Англия. Её родителей звали Henry FitzHugh и Joan Fourneux. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William Greystoke около 1351 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла 1 сентября 1403 г. в местности клиркенвелл ст джемесь, миддлесекс, Англия в возрасте 65 лет и была похоронена в местности клиркенвелл ст джемесь, миддлесекс, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Joan Fitzhugh nació en 1338, en Ravensworth, Yorkshire, Inglaterra como hija de Henry FitzHugh y Joan Fourneux. Se casó con William Greystoke aproximadamente 1351. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 1 de septiembre de 1403, en Clerkenwell St James, Middlesex, Inglaterra, a la edad de 65 años, y fue sepultada en Clerkenwell St James, Middlesex, Inglaterra.
